title: More Of Everything
description: A Minecraft Mod that overhauls the Game, to improve its Game Experience.
body:
More of everything adds...well Everything:

More copper related blocks

Swamp villages

A new tool set

A new stonetype

More food
    
More changes will follow soon

[Discord](https://discord.gg/QJhC5XbTv7)
